## Security Checklist

- [ ] No destructive command added without explicit confirmation
- [ ] Command execution remains whitelist-based
- [ ] Sensitive files are not committed (plan_asistente_local.txt, local secrets)
- [ ] No credentials or tokens in code/logs

## Behavior Checklist

- [ ] Local command path still works (rules-first)
- [ ] LLM fallback path still works when needed
- [ ] dry_run behavior remains safe by default

Anything important to review first.
